message:
test: ungate and rewrite proptest_compensation (10 tests)

Rewrote tests to match actual TxCompensationReport API: no step_results
field, no no_compensation_count, receipts are serde_json::Value.
Fixed TxStep (ordinal usize, description field), removed Draft variant,
corrected barrier semantics (first failure skips remaining).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
